mapper.select: SELECT id, title, word_count, read_count, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY book_id ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC) AS chapterNum FROM book_chapter WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE book_chapter SET read_count = read_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM book_chapter WHERE book_id IN
#{bookId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE book_chapter
title = #{bookChapter.title},
content = #{bookChapter.content},
word_count = #{bookChapter.wordCount},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{bookChapter.id} AND book_id = #{bookChapter.bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, book_id, sort_order, title, content, word_count, read_count, created_at, updated_at FROM book_chapter WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{question}, '%') ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 30
